product: Genie Space sample data, Research Agent, and space manager improvements
tagline: Sample data tab: View sample data to understand the context behind a Genie Space.
what_it_does: Sample data tab: View sample data to understand the context behind a Genie Space. Text answer summaries in API: Text answer summaries are now returned in the API. Research Agent starter questions (Beta): Curated starter questions are now available for Research Agent mode.
